title:
Linkage mapping of two mutant loci controlling leaf necrosis
and glabrousness in chickpea (Cicer arietinum L.)
abstract:
Linkage analysis of two linked mutant loci controlling leaf
necrosis (nec) and glabrous shoot (gl) was done with
eleven isozyme loci in two F2 populations of chickpea
(Cicer arietinum L.). The nee and gl loci were located
closely linked to the isozyme locus Amy, 6.2 ± 1.8 cM
and 15.4 ± 2.8 cM apart respectively, in a gene order of
Amy-nec-gl. As the locus Amy is known to be located
on linkage group VII, nec and gl loci were also assigned
to this linkage group. The isozyme AMY can be used
as marker for necrosis gene in segregating generations.
publication: Indian Journal of Genetics and Plant Breeding
